name: Marqeta
description: Marqeta — Modern card issuing platform for virtual and physical Visa/Mastercard cards with real-time authorization controls via API.

seo.title: Marqeta — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Marqeta: Marqeta — Modern card issuing platform for virtual and physical Visa/Mastercard cards with real-time authorization controls via API.

when_to_use: Virtual and physical Visa/Mastercard card issuing with real-time auth controls
Just-in-time funding and spend control API for corporate card programs
Card-as-a-service for fintech building debit, credit, or prepaid programs
Real-time webhook-driven card authorization for spend management apps

pros: Global card issuing in many regions
review.verdict: Gold-standard card issuing platform for scale — right choice when volume justifies enterprise commitment.
review.best_for: Later-stage fintechs issuing cards at significant scale globally
review.not_for: Early-stage teams wanting fast self-serve virtual cards

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
